output.edit_description: Add comment near transition IDs dict documenting what each transition does.
patch_commands:
sed -i 's/transition_ids\s*\{[^}]*\}/transition_ids\s*\{
  comment: "Each transition is documented below.

  - \1
\}/' scripts/jira-drain.py
output.risk_notes: Ensure no syntax errors in the existing transition_ids dict.
